university.desc: We form free individuals with a sense of human dignity, capable of innovative activity, who successfully realise themselves in Ukraine and in the world

principles.desc_1: A person is at the centre of the future specialist. We create a personalised plan for building a successful career for each person with support until employment
principles.desc_2: Learning is an exciting and meaningful journey
principles.desc_3: We train in accordance with market requirements
principles.desc_4: Curricula are developed for each specialisation, each set, each client company
principles.desc_5: Intensive training is nothing superfluous, only what is needed to get your first job
principles.desc_6: Competent, experienced practitioners are involved in the training process and teach the competencies they themselves possess
principles.desc_7: Many practical classes are real environment at each stage. Theory must be reinforced by practice, this is the only way to form an adequate understanding of processes
principles.desc_8: We structure our training so that you can choose and develop in the specialisation you like. Professional realization i  your favourite occupation is an opportunity to live a full life
principles.desc_9: Self-education is mandatory at each stage of study - we teach you to use resources for self-study competently and regularly, and to plan your time effectively
principles.desc_10: We constantly change and improve our training programmes in line with market requirements
principles.desc_11: Motivated talents receive quality education for free
principles.desc_12: Training and internships on real projects. Project activities as a way to consolidate knowledge and skills and a prerequisite for moving to the next stage of study. Teamwork is a must-have

environment.desc_1: the manifestation of everyone's own creative abilities. Independent thinking is a source of new and creative solutions
environment.desc_2: kindness, tolerance, care for others, the world around us, and its improvement are the foundation of positive thinking for every graduate
environment.desc_3: students build adequate self-esteem and self-confidence, which allows them to achieve their goals. We form  moral integrity and the ability to defend one's rightness with arguments
environment.desc_4: values that form a correct understanding of self-realisation and success
environment.desc_5: students to think critically and not be afraid of responsibility for mistakes. We teach you to think and express your thoughts and value the opinions of others
environment.desc_6: you to adapt quickly. We teach you to apply the acquired knowledge and skills in conditions of  constant change
environment.desc_7: an environment where students are motivated to learn and teachers are ready to share their experience. We fill educational life with real, meaningful events that create a special community of lifelong like-minded friends.
environment.desc_8: an environment where students are motivated to learn and teachers are ready to share their experience. We fill the educational life with real, authentic events that form a special community of like-minded friends for life
environment.desc_9: creativity and innovation that will allow us to compete in the market. Become the one who controls the machines, not the one who is controlled by them. Become a content creator, not a content consumer

result.title: Result
result.item_2: The result of education is a guaranteed successful professional implementation in the Ukrainian economy
result.item_3: The best investment in a successful future is a high-quality, effective education
result.item_4: A university diploma is an indication of the level of competence of a specialist, not of the courses taken or subjects read
result.item_6: Every graduate is our pride. Our graduates promote true values in society
result.item_7: We create new, modern standards of prestigious and effective education
